channel.title: PixConvert Blog
channel.description: Expert guides on image formats, compression, and conversion. HEIC vs JPG, WebP vs PNG, AVIF explained, and more.

item.title: HEIC vs JPG: Complete Comparison Guide 2026
item.description: Detailed comparison of HEIC and JPEG image formats.

item.description: Step-by-step guide to convert iPhone HEIC photos to JPG on Windows.

item.description: Learn when to use PNG vs JPEG for web images.
